description: Flatten Claude Code sessions: keep every prompt and event verbatim, resume at a lower token count.
name: io.github.shayaShav/flatten-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Set to 1 to count token savings exactly via Anthropic's count_tokens endpoint (requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). Off by default: key presence alone never triggers a network call.
environmentVariables.name: FLATTEN_COUNT_EXACT

environmentVariables.description: Optional. API key for the exact token count; ignored unless FLATTEN_COUNT_EXACT=1.
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Model id used for the exact token count (default: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001).
environmentVariables.name: FLATTEN_COUNT_MODEL

title: flatten-mcp
